subcodes.first_line: O dear servant of the Blessed Beauty, that which thou hast written hath been perused. Concerning the Takbir in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده عزیز جمال ابهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید در خصوص تکبیر در
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for the departed, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness
